div1.entryFree: Bullen, family name of the second wife of Henry VIII: Sir Thomas --'s daughter, H8 I, 4, 92. Anne B. III, 2, 36. III, 2, 36 III, 2, 36 (this candle burns not clear, III, 2, 96. 'There may be a play intended on the word Bullen, which is said to have been an ancient provincial name for a candle.' Staunton).
